title: Better Portals
body:
This mod expands the vanilla portal, making it not limited to traveling back and forth between the overworld and the nether.
# The Return Portal
![A Return Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64d5c3e1e09c25becc1cf57cc6e7a0ef6d7c7f10.png)
When you activate a portal in the overworld except above the bedrock, a return portal will be created. Entering the Return Portal will teleport you to the spawn point of the world (the location indicated by the compass).
# The Nether Portal
![A Nether Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4c898d16b29a08efb474cb7faba42136f5cf1c9.png)
Now a nether portal will only be created when you activate the portal above the bedrock of the overworld, and activating the portal in the nether will always create a nether portal. The function of the nether portal is still to travel back and forth between the overworld and nether.
# The Gateway Portal
![A Gateway Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8553604ba9906ce218466ef87c0426c623e20f13.png)
When all four corners of the portal frame are STAINED terracotta, activating the portal will create a gateway portal. The gateway portal will teleport you to a location based on the color of the four terracotta, with a teleportation distance of 100-25600 blocks. Using the gateway portal, you can easily reach distant locations. The gateway portal will not generate a return portal, so you had better to prepare ten obsidian blocksto build a return portal or other means to return before entering the portal .
